name: Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cut-up chicken in a stockpot (or other large, heavy pot).
2. Cover with COLD water.
3. Add celery pieces, onion, peppercorns, and parsley sprigs to the pot.
4. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and skim foam from the top of the soup.
6. Partially cover the pot and simmer for 90 minutes.
7. Cool slightly.
8. Remove chicken and strain broth.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Chop chicken meat and return it to the broth if desired.
11. Stir in vermicelli and simmer for 15 minutes.
12. Beat eggs with lemon juice and add a small amount of hot soup, stirring.
13. Pour egg mixture into the stockpot.
14. Mix well and heat through.
15. Garnish with chopped parsley and slivered carrot before serving.
